## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New defensive check / feature
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] CI / packaging
- [ ] Plugin example

## Defensive scope

- [ ] Read-only inspection only (no exploitation or offensive capability)
- [ ] Findings include `id`, `severity`, `title`, and `note`
- [ ] Tests added or updated (`python -m unittest discover -s tests -v`)

## Checklist

- [ ] `python -m unittest discover -s tests -v` passes locally
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated (if user-facing)
- [ ] README / SKILL.md updated (if behavior changed)
